name: Grandma's Applesauce Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple, Washed, Peeled, Cored, Sliced Thinly
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, beat together until creamy the butter, eggs, apple juice, and applesauce.
2. Add flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon. Beat well.
3. Stir in raisins if desired.
4. Oil and flour an 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Line the bottom of the pan with one layer deep of thinly sliced apple slices.
6. Spoon batter over the apples and smooth the top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes, or until well-browned.
8. Invert onto a wire rack; let cool with the apple side up.
9. Serve on individual dessert plates with the apple side up, spooning warm applesauce over each portion.
